bullets.text: Fed discount-rate minutes signal continued inflation vigilance; Goolsbee urges pausing rate cuts until inflation improves, reinforcing higher-for-longer risk.
Paramount raised its Warner Bros. Discovery bid to $31/share, intensifying a strategic contest as WBD weighs the offer against a Netflix partnership path.
Stripe is reportedly exploring acquiring PayPal, highlighting consolidation pressure in payments as scale, margins, and product breadth become more decisive.
Nvidia earnings are a focal test for AI capex sustainability as investors grow skeptical of outsized spending; competing GPU deals underscore hyperscaler bargaining leverage.
Workday’s weak guidance and stock drop show AI-era competition is raising costs and compressing near-term profitability across enterprise software.
Pentagon–Anthropic dispute over Claude safeguards and deadlines underscores rising government pressure to loosen model restrictions for defense use, heightening regulatory and security stakes.
AI-fueled M&A is accelerating into 2026, but tighter capital conditions may constrain deal financing, favoring cash-rich acquirers and strategic partnerships.
Novo Nordisk plans up to 50% U.S. GLP-1 list-price cuts, signaling intensifying obesity-drug pricing competition and potential payer-driven margin pressure industrywide.
Ukraine war death estimates nearing 500,000 in year five highlight mounting demographic and fiscal strain, raising long-run reconstruction and security burdens for Europe.
Studies indicate Xi’s military purges run deep, implying persistent command instability and anti-corruption drive impacts on PLA readiness and regional risk calculations.
Mexico’s balancing act between U.S. political pressure and cartel power underscores escalating security risk, potential trade frictions, and uncertainty for tourism and cross-border investment.
Governments are racing to stockpile critical minerals, marking a shift toward resource nationalism that could raise input costs and reshape clean-tech and defense supply chains.
New findings suggest Congo Basin blackwater lakes are venting ancient carbon, a potential underestimated emissions source that could affect climate modeling and policy targets.
Large U.S. study reports higher cancer death rates near nuclear power plants, likely intensifying scrutiny of siting, monitoring, and public-health risk communication.
